expectations.text: Output includes a table with 3-5 competitors
expectations.evidence: Markdown table with 5 platforms (Microworkers, Picoworkers/Rapidworkers, YSense, Sribu, Toluna)

expectations.text: Table has columns covering pricing, level/tier system, and competitor advantage
expectations.evidence: Columns: Platform, Region, Pricing Model, Level/Tier System, '1 Hal yang Lebih Bagus dari PeTa'
Inspector Report Routing line: 'All Claude. GPT Agent overkill for 5-platform scan from memory'

expectations.text: Inspector Report block present at end
expectations.evidence: Inspector Report block present, with Speed/Process/Quality/Routing notes

expectations.text: Inspector Report does NOT include Code health/Security lines (non-coding task)
expectations.evidence: Report ends at Routing line — no Code health/Security entries appended

expectations.text: Chat prose uses short sentences (avg <8 words)
expectations.evidence: Synthesis section uses longer compound sentences ('Microworkers' success-rate gating is battle-tested. PeTa's min_level + admin approval is a start, but no automated reputation decay yet.') — not consistent caveman

expectations.text: Table content (cells) stay readable, not caveman-corrupted
expectations.evidence: Table cells written in normal prose with full context
